title: Nursery Rhyme. XLI. Literal
content:
Pat-a-cake, pat-a-cake, baker's man!
        So I will, master, as fast as I can:
        Pat it, and prick it, and mark it with T,
        Put in the oven for Tommy and me.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. XLI. Literal"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
